comment: Adjusted EBITDA bridge (QoE-5). GAAP Net Income → standard EBITDA add-backs (interest, tax, D&A) → GAAP EBITDA → QoE adjustments (owner-comp normalization, one-time costs, discretionary perks) → Adjusted EBITDA. Three time windows: YTD, latest month, TTM. QoE add-backs are user-maintained in _etl_scripts/ebitda_adjustments.json. Built by _etl_scripts/build_ebitda_bridge.mjs.

qoe_adjustments.label: Owner compensation normalization
qoe_adjustments.reason: PLACEHOLDER — fill in the difference between Beau's current Allmoxy compensation (W2 + benefits) and the market rate a buyer would pay for a CEO replacement. If currently UNDER-market, this is a negative adjustment (subtract from EBITDA). If OVER-market, positive (add back). Pull Beau's 2026 W2 + Gusto medical/dental from src/data/payroll or HubSpot, and use the market benchmark referenced in the CIM Packet.

qoe_adjustments.label: One-time legal/advisory fees for sale process
qoe_adjustments.reason: PLACEHOLDER — any legal, M&A advisory, or QoE prep fees that hit the P&L specifically for the sale process. These won't recur post-close. Pull from 6810 Accounting and 6800 Professional Services line items.

qoe_adjustments.label: Discretionary owner perks / personal expenses
qoe_adjustments.reason: PLACEHOLDER — personal expenses, travel, meals, or other benefits run through the P&L that a new owner would not continue. Common buckets: meals (6900), travel (6400), culture/morale (7200/7260). Be conservative — only add back what's clearly personal vs. business.

qoe_adjustments.label: Owner compensation normalization
qoe_adjustments.reason: PLACEHOLDER — fill in the difference between Beau's current Allmoxy compensation (W2 + benefits) and the market rate a buyer would pay for a CEO replacement. If currently UNDER-market, this is a negative adjustment (subtract from EBITDA). If OVER-market, positive (add back). Pull Beau's 2026 W2 + Gusto medical/dental from src/data/payroll or HubSpot, and use the market benchmark referenced in the CIM Packet.

qoe_adjustments.label: Discretionary owner perks / personal expenses
qoe_adjustments.reason: PLACEHOLDER — personal expenses, travel, meals, or other benefits run through the P&L that a new owner would not continue. Common buckets: meals (6900), travel (6400), culture/morale (7200/7260). Be conservative — only add back what's clearly personal vs. business.

ttm.label: TTM (unavailable)
ttm.reason: Only 5 month(s) of P&L data available (2026-01 – 2026-05). TTM bridge will activate automatically once the QB P&L export covers 12+ months. Upload an extended Profit and Loss xlsx to /Users/beaulewis/projects/2 - Allmoxy - CFO/Allmoxy+LLC_Profit+and+Loss.xlsx and re-run refresh_all.
